title: EarnBench: Executable Counterfactual Measurement of Earned Success for Software Engineering Agents
description: EarnBench is a judge-free measurement instrument for success-conditional shortcut-sensitive survival (EF@Π) on fixed SWE-bench-class patch artifacts under a frozen three-channel perturbation registry (pi_vtest, pi_verif, pi_env). This deposit contains the public Python instrument, registry specifications, CLI, tests, and synthetic examples. Companion frozen validation CSVs and Docker batch outputs are documented in the TOSEM paper supplement layout and are not all included in this archive.
